comments.body:
This is ~blocked on updating c/storage to move away from the broken API.

A test version exists in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28018 ; Cc: @jankaluza
I will get to it as a first thing tomorrow morning. I have different PRs to work on today which I want to finish first.
This should happen in #801 , for the record.
